title: NPC Autopilot
description: Foundry VTT NPC combat autopilot for D&D 5e. v3.8.4: native thrown-weapon drops — when an NPC throws a dagger/javelin/handaxe, it appears as a loot token on the map. No ItemPiles required. v3.8.3: unified dnd5e attack path (no Midi-QOL branching), correct hit-indicator rendering. v3.8.0: Ollama Bridge AI narration. Soft dependency — safe without.
